lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਦਾਤਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jug jug daataa avar na koe |
lines.english: Throughout the ages, He is the Great Giver; there is no other at all.
The body falls apart, like algae upon the water. ||24||
God Himself appears throughout the three worlds.
Remaining awake and aware, I am pleasing to You, O Lord.
I ask for the Lord's Praises, which bless me with honor and credit.
As it pleases You, You protect and preserve us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਖਿ ਬੋਲਣੁ ਕਿਆ ਜਗ ਸਿਉ ਵਾਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jhakh bolan kiaa jag siau vaad |
lines.english: Why do you speak such nonsense, and argue with the world?
I chant Your Victorious Praises, O Life of the World.
Accepting the Guru's Teachings, one is sure to merge in the One Lord. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂ ਮੇਲਹਿ ਤਾ ਤੁਝੈ ਸਮਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa too meleh taa tujhai samaavaa |
lines.english: When You unite me with Yourself, then I am merged in You.
You shall die repenting, when you see your own insanity.
He is born, only to die, but he does not wish to live.
He comes hopeful, and then goes, without hope.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਈ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paaee nav nidh har kai naae |
lines.english: The nine treasures are obtained through the Name of the Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਚਾਂਪੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaal na chaanpai har gun gaae |
lines.english: Death does not chew up one who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੁਰਿ ਝੁਰਿ ਝਖਿ ਮਾਟੀ ਰਲਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jhur jhur jhakh maattee ral jaae |
lines.english: Regretting, repenting and grieving, he is dust mixing with dust.
One who takes the Words of the Guru into his very fiber,
the Lord bestows intuitive peace and poise. ||26||
He speaks spiritual wisdom, and He Himself understands it.
He Himself knows it, and He Himself comprehends it.
In the ocean of the Guru, there is no shortage of pearls.
is immaculate and holy, and is pleasing to the True Lord.
The treasure of jewels is truly inexhaustible.
Do those deeds which the Guru has ordained.
O Nanak, through the Guru's Teachings, merge in the True Lord. ||27||
Why are you chasing after the Guru's actions?
The Husband Lord abandons and leaves behind the evil-minded bride.
The arm is broken, when it is pulled from both sides.
Love is broken, when one speaks in defiance.
Love breaks, when the speech goes sour.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one's affairs are resolved in one's own home.
One who earns the profit of the True Name, will not lose it again;
The broken knot is tied again, through contemplation and meditation.
The world is destroyed by conflict, regretting its sinful mistakes.
Control your mind, and keep it in its place.
the Lord and Master of the three worlds is your best friend. ||28||
He summons her to the Mansion of His Presence, and no obstacles block her path.
There is one Husband Lord, and all are His brides.
The false bride wears many costumes.
He stops her from going into the homes of others;

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੋਲਤ ਡੋਲਤ ਹੇ ਸਖੀ ਫਾਟੇ ਚੀਰ ਸੀਗਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ddolat ddolat he sakhee faatte cheer seegaar |
lines.english: Wandering and roaming around, O my companion, your beautiful robes are torn.
She is the happy soul bride, who takes the Support of her Lord and Master. ||29||
She is embellished with the Word of the Shabad, and is loved by the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਰਪਿ ਮੁਈ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਡੀਠੀ ਕੰਤਿ ਸੁਜਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: ddarap muee ghar aapanai ddeetthee kant sujaan |
lines.english: One who remains dead within her own home, through the Fear of God, is looked upon with favor by her all-knowing Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਾਹਪਣਿ ਤਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਡਰ ਬਿਣਠੀ ਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ddaahapan tan sukh nahee bin ddar binatthee ddaar |
lines.english: In jealousy, the body is not at peace; without the Fear of God, multitudes are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੂਗਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਤਿਖਾ ਘਣੀ ਜਬ ਦੇਖਾ ਨਹੀ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: ddoogar vaas tikhaa ghanee jab dekhaa nahee door |
lines.english: Living on the mountain, I suffer such great thirst; when I see Him, I know that He is not far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਰੁ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: ddar raakhiaa gur aapanai nirbhau naam vakhaan |
lines.english: She maintains fear of her Guru, and chants the Name of the Fearless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਖਾ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tikhaa nivaaree sabad man amrit peea bharapoor |
lines.english: My thirst is quenched, and I have accepted the Word of the Shabad. I drink my fill of the Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਆਖੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: dehi dehi aakhai sabh koee jai bhaavai tai dee |
lines.english: Everyone says, "Give! Give!" As He pleases, He gives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਦੇਵਸੀ ਤਿਖਾ ਨਿਵਾਰੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: guroo duaarai devasee tikhaa nivaarai soe |30|
lines.english: Through the Gurdwara, the Guru's Door, He gives, and quenches the thirst. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਢੰਢੋਲਤ ਢੂਢਤ ਹਉ ਫਿਰੀ ਢਹਿ ਢਹਿ ਪਵਨਿ ਕਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dtandtolat dtoodtat hau firee dteh dteh pavan karaar |
lines.english: Searching and seeking, I fell down and collapsed upon the bank of the river of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰ ਅਜਾਚੀ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amar ajaachee har mile tin kai hau bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who meet the immortal and immeasurable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਰੇ ਢਹਤੇ ਢਹਿ ਪਏ ਹਉਲੇ ਨਿਕਸੇ ਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhaare dtahate dteh pe haule nikase paar |
lines.english: Those who are heavy with sin sink down, but those who are light swim across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਧੂੜਿ ਅਘੁਲੀਐ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee dhoorr aghuleeai sangat mel milaau |
lines.english: The dust of their feet brings emancipation; in their company, we are united in the Lord's Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਦੀਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man deea gur aapanai paaeaa niramal naau |
lines.english: I gave my mind to my Guru, and received the Immaculate Name.
